reviews.review_description: Maybe cos am using the quest 2 but this game still has a longway to go to improve.....not worth 5 stars yet. hopefully get good updates soon but now, not well cooked and should be FREE..Not going to ask for refund because i am very hopeful for this game

developer_response.body:
Dear Nowhere, 
Sorry for the disappointment.  Please help us to improve the game by giving suggestions. We are sincerely ready to implement your suggestions if its technically feasible. Please join our discord using the link below and help us to improve.  
https://discord.gg/DznnM5DB

reviews.review_description:
Aqua Strike is an absolute thrill ride in VR! The mix of high-speed boat racing and battle mode makes every race exciting, whether you're pushing for first place or causing chaos with power-ups like in Mario Kart. The progression system is really satisfying too—you need to win races to unlock new tracks, skins, and even faster boats, which keeps you motivated to improve.

One of the biggest surprises is how smooth and comfortable the game feels. Whatever secret trick the developers used to prevent motion sickness, it works amazingly well, making this one of the few VR racing games that don’t leave you dizzy. Plus, having a famous voice actor in the game adds an extra layer of immersion and personality—it’s a really cool touch!   @Lee  🎶👌

With the game still in Early Access, there’s plenty of potential for even more content and improvements. If you're into VR racing, this is definitely one to keep an eye on! 🚤🔥

I've been fortunate enough to follow Aqua Strike through testing and seen the game evolve before release.

It's easy to pick up and play, offers a great feeling of speed, and somehow manages to keep any motion sickness to near zero.

There's a fantastic selection of courses and the difficulty feels just right, with plenty to unlock, you'll definitely get your money worth..

Also love the announcer 😉

Dear User,
Thank you for trying out Aqua Strike. If you have any suggestions to improve the game, please share it as review or join our discord server. We will try to implement all your suggestions if technically feasible.

Discord : https://discord.gg/DznnM5DB

Thank you once again
